blocks.content: In the royal tavern, there was a secret space accessible only to Falcoa, even within the Freeman organization.
This place was the Lupe manufacturing site.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Those insolent brats! Think this is the end?

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: He had witnessed Falcoa's eccentricities for a long time, but the current situation was far from normal.
Zis, who had just finished his usual day of beckoning customers at the port, was grabbed by Falcoa's men and brought here.
A day had passed since Shirone's group caused a stir in the tavern and left, yet Falcoa's anger seemed to have not subsided.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Ha, just wait and see. I won't let them get away with this.
Falcoa laughed ominously, his face twisting into a grimace.
The faces of the infuriating Shirone and his group haunted his mind.
Amy was, of course, the one he despised the most.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Falcoa nearly drew his sword on the spot when Amy defiantly downed the drink laced with Lupe and flaunted her red eyes.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Zis glanced at Falcoa, feeling terrified.
Falcoa was fiddling with a device that ground Lupe into powder.
By compressing the roots of Lupe and extracting the juice, then grinding it until all moisture evaporated, only a fine powder remained.
But could this really be called a drug?
Traditionally, the proper use of Lupe was to chew the root and neutralize it with saliva.
However, what Falcoa was creating was nothing short of a potent chemical toxin, designed solely to maximize its effects.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Zis, we need to make another visit.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Where to?

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: To that girl, Amy. It worked once, so it should work again. Don't tell me it's impossible. You've seen my condition; you know what I'm capable of.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Zis swallowed hard. He had anticipated Falcoa's desire for revenge, but he hadn't expected it to go this far.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Are you planning to get her addicted?

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Addiction? Foolish boy. That girl will never become addicted. As if the Red-eyed Ruler of the continent would fall to something as trivial as Lupe.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Then why bother? It's just stirring up trouble for nothing.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: You imbecile. Can't you see? Because she won't get addicted, this plan will succeed.
Falcoa packed the refined Lupe powder into greaseproof paper and poured it all into a pre-prepared cup of water.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Zis's breath caught in his throat.
He had never used Lupe, but he knew how it was consumed.
Typically, one root was enough for two hours of chewing. But Falcoa had just mixed in three times that amount into the water.
Moreover, being in a liquid form meant that the effects, which would normally take six hours to manifest, would hit all at once.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: You can't mean...

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Yes, that's exactly what I intend. I'll make her drink this again. She'll confidently accept it, thinking it's harmless. But with this amount of Lupe, she won't stand a chance. You understand, don't you?

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Why would you do that? If she dies, you can't sell her.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Haha, it doesn't matter. Just bring me her corpse.
Falcoa bottled the Lupe solution. When the solution mixed with the soda in the bottle, it took on the appearance of a pretty jade-colored cocktail.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Here, take it. It's simple. Just lure her out saying you have something to discuss, then make her drink this. Load her into the carriage and bring her here. Can you do that?

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Zis stared at the glass bottle with bloodshot eyes, trembling with fear.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: What are you waiting for? Don't want it? Or do you want to drink it yourself?

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: What?
Falcoa doubted his ears.
Was the effect of Lupe still lingering? That couldn't be. He had become desensitized to Lupe's effects, thanks to his constant use.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Stop it, you filth.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: What?
Falcoa swung his fist towards Zis's delirious face with lightning speed.
Ugh!
Darkness enveloped him, and he finally grasped his reality. A grim future awaited Zis, one that could only be described as hellish.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: You crazy bastard! What's wrong with your head!
Falcoa finally showed his true colors, brutally beating Zis.
It wasn't just a beating to intimidate; he was kicking Zis's body as if he truly intended to kill him.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Die! Die! Die!

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Zis couldn't even scream.
The feeling of his body being smashed was fleeting; soon, he felt nothing. Only the shock beyond the realm of pain reached him.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Huff, right. Killing someone like you wouldn't even be fun.
Falcoa regained his composure, but this only signaled greater misfortune for Zis.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Cough! Cough!
Falcoa grabbed Zis by the hair and lifted him up.
The sensation of his neck vertebrae cracking was the least of his concerns, given his battered state.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Alright, then I have a plan too.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Without Zis, Falcoa couldn't trap Amy, but he had grown tired of considering such trifles.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Touching, Zis. To think a lowlife like such courage. Seems like you've taken a fancy to that girl, but I'll grant your wish. I won't touch her. How about that? Are you happy now?

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Please... just this once, have mercy.
Zis was in tears. He knew what Falcoa was planning.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Yuna, was it? Your sister's name. From now on, you'll regret the decision you made today for the rest of your life.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Please, not Yuna... just spare her... Cough!
Falcoa threw Zis's head to the ground as if he were discarding a useless toy.
Zis's face bounced off the floor with a thud, then plummeted down again. That single blow knocked him unconscious.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Ha, this turned out to be quite entertaining.
Falcoa had no intention of sparing Amy even though he had shifted his target to Yuna.
He planned to bring Yuna to his hideout and torment her, then use her to blackmail Zis.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Bring that girl Yuna to the hideout, now!
Falcoa roared at his subordinates with rage, then bit into a whole root of Lupe, chewing it viciously.
By the time Shirone and his companions arrived back at the villa, midnight was drawing near.
Given the distance, they had stopped for dinner on their way back.
Although they didn't achieve their primary goal in the Room of Achievement and Sacrifice, they learned a lot.
Their conversation never waned, and soon they began to share stories close to their hearts.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Oh, you want to become a soldier?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hearing about Amy's aspirations, Tess was surprised, having never imagined that Amy would aim for a military career.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Given that Amy was a fire mage and had honed her sniper mode, she was perfectly suited for a combat mage role.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: However, Tess knew Amy as someone who, contrary to appearances, was delicate and kind-hearted.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: The thought of such a person heading into battle and taking down numerous enemies was unimaginable.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: I'm actually worried. I thought Amy would be more suited for a feminine profession.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Eh? Me in a feminine job? I've never heard that before, not even in school.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Eh? Me in a feminine job? I've never heard that before, not even in school.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Hehe, I have a knack for espionage, you know. The girl Amy is actually very delicate and feminine.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy smiled subtly. She had never considered herself feminine, but she couldn't completely deny it either.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: No matter how spirited she was, the military was predominantly male, and she wasn't sure she could adapt.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: To be honest, I'm not sure. I chose fire magic because targeting is my strength.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: That led me to the most suitable profession given my major.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Of course, I have a positive view of the military. Being a soldier isn't just about fighting on the battlefield.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: That's true. There are supply officers, and if you join the strategy command, your future is bright.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Wait! What about this?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Yes? What is it?

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Yes? What is it?

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: What about becoming a spy? With your cognitive skills and long-range attacking as your forte, Amy? Plus, you have the most important weapon for espionage.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: The most important weapon? What's that?

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Your beautiful face. For a female spy, beauty is essential. No man in the world dislikes a beautiful woman.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Ah, that's it? I got my hopes up for nothing.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Hehe, sorry. But it wasn't entirely a joke. Appearance is a priority when selecting national spies. Your look would definitely work in dealing with people. So think about it seriously. I'll strongly recommend you to our family.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: No, that's okay. I'll trust in my magical abilities.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy's face flushed red. Though she responded gruffly, she didn't seem entirely displeased by the compliment.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: To Tess, Amy was a friend who provided endless amusement. She pondered how to tease her more when a genuine question crossed her mind.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: But what happens after graduation?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Ah? We take the official exams and look for jobs, of course.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: No, I mean Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Shirone? Why bring him up?
